atoms.source_snippet:
pub struct SpcVerificationRequest {
    pub precompile_input: Bytes,
    pub output: Bytes,
    pub proof: Bytes,
    pub precompile_address: Address,
    pub executor: Address,
    pub block_number: u64,
    pub tx_hash: B256,
    pub previous_block_hash: B256,
    pub previous_block_number: u64,
    pub previous_block_timestamp: u64,
    pub proposer_signature: Bytes,
    pub error: Option<String>,
    pub success: bool,
}
atoms.semantic_claim: The request data model carries all proof-validation material and trace fields in one owned struct: precompile input/output/proof/address, executor address, SPC block number, transaction hash, previous-block hash/number/timestamp, proposer signature, optional error message, and success flag.

destinations.evidence: Restores the public reth_evm::spc API: SpcVerificationError, SpcVerifier, SpcVerificationRequest, BatchVerificationResult, all_valid, and total_count.
Exports #[cfg(feature = "std")] pub mod spc.
SpcVerifierImpl implements reth_evm::spc::SpcVerifier and converts requests/results to and from the concrete ritual-spc-verification crate.
Concrete verifier implements verify_batch, verify_parallel_optimized, get_previous_block_data, ensure_registry_synced, update_registry_from_data, and fail-closed result counting.
Concrete SpcVerificationRequest carries precompile input/output/proof/address, executor, block number, tx hash, previous block hash/number/timestamp, proposer signature, error, and success.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Mutate each SPC field independently in a fulfilled transaction or settlement context, especially tx_hash, block_number, previous-block fields, input, output, proof, and executor, and assert the destination rejects the block or payload consistently.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: request field set is restored at the public API and mapped into the concrete verifier request. Core transaction/block/executor/proof binding fields are present.

atoms.semantic_claim: Batch verification results record per-request Ok/Err outcomes, success/failure counts, total duration, and define all_valid as true only when failed_count is zero and every per-request result is Ok(true); Err and Ok(false) both make the batch invalid.

destinations.evidence: Restores the public reth_evm::spc API: SpcVerificationError, SpcVerifier, SpcVerificationRequest, BatchVerificationResult, all_valid, and total_count.

summary: Mechanical review complete. The SPC public EVM API is restored in the v2 port at crates/evm/evm/src/spc.rs: SpcVerificationError, SpcVerifier, SpcVerificationRequest, BatchVerificationResult, all_valid, and total_count are present. The node bridge in crates/ethereum/node/src/spc.rs maps the trait API to ritual-spc-verification, whose concrete verifier implements batch verification, optimized parallel verification, previous-block lookup, registry updates, request field binding, fail-closed result accounting, and basic batch tests. No confirmed FSM/runtime gap remains in this file.
notes: Reviewed against latest port commit 7f8a668d24, which restored reth_evm::spc and the node bridge.
The old missing statuses were stale: the public API now exists at crates/evm/evm/src/spc.rs.
Concrete runtime behavior is provided by crates/ethereum/node/src/spc.rs and crates/ritual-spc-verification/src/{types,verifier}.rs.
